g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about spike sorting algorithms')
g.text: Raw extracellular voltage · threshold crossing · PCA waveform clustering · unit isolation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain spike binning and population vectors')
g.text: Fixed-width time bins (20–50 ms) · multi-channel firing rate matrix · Gaussian smoothing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does PCA compress neural population activity?')
g.text: N channels → K latent dims · variance explained curve · scree plot · fit on train, transform on test
Stacked LSTM · L1/L2 weight regularization · dropout · sequence-to-value trajectory output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does uncertainty estimation work in neural decoders?')
g.text: MC Dropout inference · Bayesian confidence intervals · per-timestep variance output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What validation scheme is best for BCI decoders?')
g.text: Leave-one-out CV · time-series split · R² / RMSE / VE metrics · Wiener filter baseline

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the inference API return for trajectory decoding?')
g.text: FastAPI · streaming WebSocket · (x, y, confidence) per timestep · sub-50 ms latency

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Describe the MLflow and Docker setup')
g.text: Docker Compose · MLflow registry · Prefect flows · DVC data versioning · Hydra configs
